input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule F.3.3.1 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: f.3.3.1
            TITLE: definition

            CONTENT:
            rule F.3.3.1: Definition
F.3.3.1 Definition 
Any tubing which does NOT meet F.3.2.1.o Structural Tubing

final_answer: rule F.3.3.1: Definition F.3.3.1 Definition Any tubing which does NOT meet F.3.2.1.o Structural Tubing
